Class ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder
Enclosing class:
ExpirationOptions
public static class ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder extends Object
Builder to build ExpirationOptions
Since:
3.5
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExpirationOptions
    build()
     
    ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder
    gt()
    Apply to fields when the new expiration is greater than the current one.
    ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder
    lt()
    Apply to fields when the new expiration is lower than the current one.
    ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder
    nx()
    Apply to fields that have no expiration.
    ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder
    xx()
    Apply to fields that have an existing expiration.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • nx

      @Contract("-> this") public ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder nx()
      Apply to fields that have no expiration.

    • xx

      @Contract("-> this") public ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder xx()
      Apply to fields that have an existing expiration.

    • gt

      @Contract("-> this") public ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder gt()
      Apply to fields when the new expiration is greater than the current one.

    • lt

      @Contract("-> this") public ExpirationOptions.ExpirationOptionsBuilder lt()
      Apply to fields when the new expiration is lower than the current one.

    • build

      public ExpirationOptions build()
